content.problemStatement:
Let's dive into the next capstone project: **A powerful, nested Comment System**. \
This isn't just a simple comment box. You will build a comprehensive application that could power the discussion section of any blog, news site, or forum. \
Before we dive into building it step by step, here’s a fully working demo of what you’ll create. Take a moment to explore the app and see the big picture. \
Click on **RUN** to start the project. Open the browser in a new tab and explore how the Comment System app works. \
**A superuser account with the following credentials has already been created for you:**
- Username: `chef`
- Password: `chefpass@123` \
You can also sign up with new accounts to test the features from a normal user's perspective.
### Features You Will Build:
This project is packed with real-world functionality. \
**By the end, your application will support:**
- Core Commenting:
- Add comments to static pages (like blog posts).
- Reply to other comments, up to 5 levels deep.
- Upvote and downvote comments to show appreciation.

**User Permissions:**
- Edit your own comments, but only within 5 minutes of posting.
- Delete your own comments (which "soft deletes" them to preserve replies).
- Report inappropriate comments from other users.

**Automated Systems & Moderation:**
- Comments are automatically hidden after 5 unique user reports.
- Users are automatically promoted to Moderator status after receiving 10 upvotes on their comments.
- Moderators have special powers to edit, delete, or hide any comment, at any time.

**System Constraints:**
- A single comment thread (a top-level comment and all its replies) can have a maximum of 50 total comments.

**How This Capstone Works:**
- The project is broken down into 8 self-contained sub-tasks.
- After each sub-task, you’ll be able to run the server and see a meaningful, working feature in your browser.
- Each step builds toward the complete Comment System app.
- By the end, you’ll have a polished, real-world Django application to showcase in your portfolio.
